description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named docs that triggers on push to the main branch. The workflow should update API documentation in a separate docs branch. It should run on an ubuntu-20.04 environment with write permissions, check out the repository with submodules, compile and install Doxygen 1.8.20 from source, update the Doxygen configuration with the latest version tag, generate documentation using make-docs.py, commit the changes, and force-push the updated docs to the docs branch.
